description: Current deploy steps for the FastAPI SQL CSV export crash fix. Git sync is handled before this runner starts; the runner only restarts datavis.service and verifies local health.

actions.name: Restart datavis.service
actions.description: Restart the FastAPI service so the SQL CSV export crash fix is live.

actions.name: Retry local /api/health
actions.description: Retry the local health endpoint once per second for up to 20 seconds after the restart.
